name: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List For Potential Suspicious Application
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List For Potential Suspicious Application
SIGMA Description: Detects the addition of a new rule to the Windows Firewall exception list for an application located in a potentially suspicious location.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\perflogs*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\tmp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\tasks\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%2%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List For Potential Suspicious Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\perflogs*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\tmp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\tasks\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%2%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List For Potential Suspicious Application
